content: userexists  Table of contents Prototype: userexists(user) Return type: boolean Description: Return whether user name or numerical id exists on this host. Checks whether the user is in the password database for the current host. The argument must be a user name or user id. Arguments: user : string - User name or identifier - in the range: .* Example: code body common control { bundlesequence => { "example" }; } bundle agent example { classes : "ok" expression => userexists ( "root" ); reports : ok :: "Root exists" ; !ok :: "Root does not exist" ; } Output: code R: Root exists
title: userexists
